contract_role: source-owned collapse model for large philosophy graph review

cluster_families.label: Era
cluster_families.review_use: collapse very large chronology spans before drilling into rows, traditions, and sources

cluster_families.label: Region
cluster_families.review_use: group atlas rows by current source-section region until mature region branches exist

cluster_families.label: Tradition
cluster_families.review_use: collapse branch traditions once mature tradition directories carry nodes and relations

cluster_families.label: Corpus Or Prepared Source Document
cluster_families.review_use: group rows and dossier nodes by prepared source document or later corpus branch

cluster_families.label: School Or Institution
cluster_families.review_use: surface institutional pressure without making institutions canonical by projection

cluster_families.label: Author Or Person
cluster_families.review_use: reserve collapse shape for authored philosophy growth without inventing figures from atlas rows

cluster_families.label: Work Or Research Node
cluster_families.review_use: group current atlas rows by research node while preserving that these are not yet work canon

cluster_families.label: Concept Or Problem
cluster_families.review_use: surface conceptual pressure before mature concept nodes and canon relations exist

cluster_families.label: Source Ref Or Witness
cluster_families.review_use: group every projected item by source_ref so collapse never hides provenance

cluster_families.label: Evidence Status
cluster_families.review_use: show confidence, dossier coverage, and weak evidence surfaces

cluster_families.label: Canon Or Candidate Status
cluster_families.review_use: track candidate-to-canon pressure without promoting projection rows
